_comment: This file is the sealing artifact for the held-out 20% evaluation partition (Phase 4.1 §4.1). It must be committed. Fill fields below ONCE before any annotation work begins; never modify after sealing. See packages/benchmark/calibration/calibration-seams.ts::verifyHeldoutPartitionSeal for the enforcement function.

_fields.rng_seed: integer — the frozen RNG seed used to draw the partition (commit alongside annotation tooling)
_fields.partition_hash: string — sha256 hex digest over sorted-newline-joined claim_ids in the held-out set
_fields.partition_size: integer — count of claim_ids in the held-out set
_fields.sealed_at: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which the partition was sealed
